entity.summary: Singapore-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating under the Aibit brand, with an identified corporate entity incorporated on August 1, 2022 and a currently accessible official trading platform.
entity.notes: HEI uses the August 1, 2022 incorporation of AIBIT PTE. LTD. as the earliest verified lineage marker. The exact public exchange-launch date and direct primary-source proof linking the current platform operator to that company remain unresolved, so confidence stays medium.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2022 and still operating under the Aibit brand.

changes.summary: Singapore-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating under the Aibit brand, with an identified corporate entity incorporated on August 1, 2022 and a currently accessible official trading platform.
changes.notes: HEI uses the August 1, 2022 incorporation of AIBIT PTE. LTD. as the earliest verified lineage marker. The exact public exchange-launch date and direct primary-source proof linking the current platform operator to that company remain unresolved, so confidence stays medium.

events.title: AIBIT PTE. LTD. was incorporated in Singapore
events.description: The Singapore company identified as AIBIT PTE. LTD. was incorporated on August 1, 2022, providing the earliest verified corporate-lineage marker for the Aibit exchange record.
events.notes: This is a corporate-lineage marker rather than a fully verified public exchange-launch date.

evidence.title: AIBIT PTE. LTD. Singapore company profile
evidence.notes: Company profile records UEN 202226680Z and an August 1, 2022 incorporation date in Singapore.

evidence.title: AIBIT PTE. LTD. registry profile
evidence.notes: Independent company profile corroborates UEN 202226680Z and the August 1, 2022 incorporation date.

evidence.title: Aibit official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain serves the current Aibit exchange interface.

evidence.title: Aibit wallet system upgrade announcement
evidence.notes: Official operational notice scheduled a wallet-system upgrade for July 14, 2025, corroborating continuing platform operation.
